description: Tom Shaughnessy hosts Brooks Brown to discuss the evolution of immersion in gaming and the role of crypto in play. Brooks shares insights from his experience in storytelling across various franchises, emphasizing the nature of play and the unique vision behind Nor.
topic_summary: Brooks Brown explores the concept of play and immersion in gaming, discussing its significance and how crypto can integrate into gaming experiences. He reflects on his journey and the support from Delphi in shaping his vision for Nor.
